_comment: Tier-2: NGSolve curl() on H1 basis raises NgException('Operator "curl" does not exist for H1HighOrderFESpace!'). The dual to the existing hcurl_grad_mismatch fixture — confirms the operator/space pairing is strictly checked in both directions. Maxwell-newbie pitfall: confusing the H1 elliptic form with the H(curl) form goes the OTHER way too.
